svg.title: 2-layer neural network training loop using cublasSgemm and cublasSgeam
svg.desc: Top-down flowchart of one training iteration. Forward pass uses gemm twice. Error computed on CPU. Backward pass uses gemm three times. Weight update uses geam twice. Purple for gemm, coral for geam, gray for CPU steps.

g.text: δH = W2 × δ then ReLU mask
